productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Short Black Dresses
description: Composition Black round neck short dress made of 70% modal and 30% polyester, with full arm sleeves, electropleats along the front and has a waist belt Fitting Comfort Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Flaunt your feminity in style with this black dress from united colors of benetton. The electropleats and belt redefine your feminine side with much elan. Pair this with heeled sandals and long earrings for a chic look. Model statistics The model wears size M in dresses Height-5.8", Chest-33"
